posts.author: Lucian (Lucian Lelong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently

  1. Mirror Columns show information from other connected Boards
  2. Changes on the Mirror Columns reflect in an update of the Last Update Date

Requirement
A Change in Mirror Column should be logged in Activity (UI & API) in order to allow automation to trigger or for Support.
